## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Kandji MDM implementation for GrowthX, discuss pricing, and plan next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's device count has grown to \~50, expecting 50-75 soon; requesting quotes for both](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Kandji vs. Mosyle comparison requested; Chris to provide competitive info](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [GrowthX set up ABM, exploring device enrollment strategies](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Aiming for potential deal closure by end of April (Kandji's fiscal quarter-end) for best pricing](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Growth and Device Management Needs

  - [Current headcount near 50, rapidly approaching 50-75 range](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [ABM (Apple Business Manager) account set up for domestic device purchases](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [International device purchases still need DLIT setup for auto-enrollment](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Most current devices not ABM enrolled, presenting enrollment challenges](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Policy requires device management, even for BYOD (e.g., remote wipe capability)](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### Kandji Pricing and Proposal

  - [Chris to provide two proposals: 50 and 75 max devices, both including VOLM](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Quotes will show March end-date due to tool limitations, but pricing valid for April](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [1-year vs. 2-year options: 2-year offers price protection/rate lock](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Best pricing tied to closing by Kandji's fiscal quarter-end (late April)](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [GrowthX considering Kandji and Mosyle as top contenders](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Chris shared high-level Kandji vs. Mosyle comparison (initially sent to note-taker by mistake)](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Yousef requested more competitive info/slides showcasing Kandji's advantages](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### MDM Security Considerations

  - [Non-ABM enrolled devices can potentially uninstall MDM (instructions available online)](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Kandji alerts when devices are unenrolled, allowing for follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [GrowthX policy emphasizes need for device management compliance](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Vuln Feature

  - [Yousef using Vuln at another company, renewed and added recently](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [4-5 feature requests submitted for Vuln](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Seen as valuable for closing security gaps](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Chris to send two proposals (50 and 75 max devices w/ VOLM) by Tuesday morning](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Chris to schedule follow-up meeting in 2 weeks via Yousef's Calendly link](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Yousef to review proposals and competitive info](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Both to aim for potential deal closure by end of April, pending internal GrowthX discussions](https://fathom.video/share/LvgvnKigQvDfdpChiG_TemzbpzNeatAC?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
